entries.definition:
z-f-f walking fast; wailing of the wind; teeth chattering; a bride’s procession. Of this root, only يَزِفُّونَ yaziffūn occurs once in the Qur’an.
يَزِفُّ yaziff [imperf. of v. زَفَّ zaffa, intrans.] to hurry, to be in haste (37:94) فَأَقْبَلُوا إِلَيْهِ يَزِفُّونَ they came towards him in haste.
entries.definition_english:
z-f-f walking fast; wailing of the wind; teeth chattering; a bride’s procession. Of this root, only يَزِفُّونَ yaziffūn occurs once in the Qur’an.
يَزِفُّ yaziff [imperf. of v. زَفَّ zaffa, intrans.] to hurry, to be in haste (37:94) فَأَقْبَلُوا إِلَيْهِ يَزِفُّونَ they came towards him in haste.
